title: 悬崖上的谋杀
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\241-悬崖上的谋杀-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
After confirming that the Bishop of St. Botolph's car never left his garage, Frankie concludes that the deep blue Talbot seen near the cliff fall must have been using a false license plate. She attempts to research the Marquisbults' directory to find more information, but the search is hindered by the high number of individuals named Evans.

A week later, Bobby arrives in London to assist Budge with business matters. He has been receiving illegible letters from Frankie instructing him to wait for her directions. Due to a previous experience with morphine, Bobby is suspicious of food and drink and carries a military revolver for protection. Frankie arrives in a Bentley accompanied by George Abathnot, whom she introduces as a doctor.

Frankie reveals her plan to Bobby: she intends to infiltrate Baskerville Hall in Stapleton, Devon, to investigate the Baskerville family. To gain access, she plans to stage a car crash near the hall's gates. George will act as a witnessing doctor and insist that Frankie be taken into the house for medical observation due to a concussion. Frankie intends to use her status as the daughter of a countess to secure respect and entry.

Frankie instructs Bobby not to participate in the immediate scheme but tells him he must grow a mustache—potentially a theatrical one—and dress in a driver's uniform. She plans to have him drive a Bentley to Stapleton, reasoning that Baskingridge will not recognize him as the same person, as he previously perceived Bobby only briefly as a "golf-playing idiot."
